title: vitis qinlingensis
intro: Vitis qinlingensis, also known as Qinling grapevine or Chinese wild grapevine, is a species of deciduous vine in the grape family native to the Qinling Mountains in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vitis qinlingensis include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Vitis qinlingensis can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, and capsules for medicinal use, and it is also used as an ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
